utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package: destination (Rome, Italy) is clearly specified; travel_dates (June 20–24, 2024) are provided; transportation (flight details with cost) is included with provider and cost; accommodation (hotel with cost) is specified; activities (two listed with costs) are provided; additional_services is present but null, so not included with details; total_budget (cost breakdown, currency, remaining budget) is fully specified. Therefore, 6 of 7 items appear and 5 of them are fully detailed (destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, total_budget). Additional_services is not fully specified.
